_comment: To add new calculations, copy this example and modify:
_example: Uncomment and edit the block below

__EXAMPLE__yourCustomCalc.__availableParams: totalEnergy, totalCost, avgPower, maxPower, deviceCount, daysElapsed, avgVoltage, avgCurrent, sumOfIndividualPeaks, systemPeak

energyEfficiency.name: Energy Efficiency Rating
energyEfficiency.description: Measures how much energy you get per rupee spent

loadFactor.name: Load Factor
loadFactor.description: Ratio of average to peak load - higher is better

peakDemandCharge.name: Peak Demand Charge
peakDemandCharge.description: Estimated charge based on maximum demand

diversityFactor.name: Diversity Factor
diversityFactor.description: Sum of individual peaks vs system peak

costPerDevice.name: Average Cost per Device
costPerDevice.description: Total cost divided by number of active devices

powerQuality.name: Power Quality Index
powerQuality.description: Voltage stability indicator (closer to 100% is better)

apparentPower.name: Apparent Power
apparentPower.description: Calculated from average voltage and current

currentUtilization.name: Current Utilization
currentUtilization.description: Average current draw across all devices
